nodes.name: generate-org-chart-images.ts
nodes.summary: Standalone script that renders all five org chart styles to PNG images using Playwright/Chromium, providing browser-native emoji rendering and pixel-perfect CSS output. Outputs to tmp/org-chart-images/.

nodes.name: generate-org-chart-satori-comparison.ts
nodes.summary: Generates a side-by-side comparison of org chart renders produced by Satori (SVG/PNG) versus the Playwright approach, writing output images and a summary JSON to tmp/.

nodes.name: generate-plugin-package-json.mjs
nodes.summary: ESM script that generates the package.json for the plugin SDK package, deriving fields from the repo root manifest and writing the result to the plugin package directory.

nodes.name: generate-ui-package-json.mjs
nodes.summary: ESM script that generates the package.json for the UI package, deriving version and metadata from the root manifest.

nodes.name: kill-agent-browsers.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that finds and terminates all Playwright/Chromium browser processes launched by Paperclip agents, using process name matching to avoid collateral kills.

nodes.name: kill-dev.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive script to terminate all local Paperclip dev server processes across all worktrees, including Node.js servers, PostgreSQL instances (via PID files), and agent browser processes. Supports a --dry-run preview mode.

nodes.name: kill-vitest.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that identifies and kills all running vitest processes to unblock hung or zombie test workers during development.

nodes.name: link-plugin-dev-sdk.mjs
nodes.summary: ESM script that symlinks the local plugin SDK package into a development workspace, enabling live iteration on plugin-sdk without publishing to npm.

nodes.name: measure-issue-chat-long-thread.mjs
nodes.summary: ESM script that loads a long issue chat thread in a Playwright browser and measures rendering performance metrics such as scroll latency and DOM query times using data-testid selectors.

nodes.name: migrate-inline-env-secrets.ts
nodes.summary: One-shot migration script that scans agent adapter configs for sensitive inline environment variable values, creates named secrets via the secret service, and rewrites agent records to reference secret IDs instead of plain values.

nodes.name: paperclip-commit-metrics.ts
nodes.summary: Comprehensive CLI tool that searches the GitHub Commits API for AI-co-authored commits, enriches them with per-commit diff stats, and exports a summary as JSON or CSV — with local caching and recursive time-window splitting to work around the 1000-result API cap.

nodes.name: paperclip-issue-update.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that posts an update comment to a specified Paperclip issue via the API, used to report CI pipeline status or release notes back to the issue tracker.

nodes.name: prepare-server-ui-dist.sh
nodes.summary: Short shell script that copies the built UI static assets into the server's ui-dist directory so they can be served alongside the API in production bundles.

nodes.name: provision-worktree.sh
nodes.summary: Comprehensive shell script that initialises a new git worktree as an isolated Paperclip workspace: copies or symlinks config and .env, runs the paperclipai CLI worktree-init, and configures agent-specific database seeds — used by CI and agent orchestration infrastructure.

nodes.name: release-lib.sh
nodes.summary: Shared bash library sourced by release.sh and related scripts, providing helpers for git remote resolution, version calculation, npm publishing, and release validation logic.

nodes.name: release-package-manifest.json
nodes.summary: Static JSON manifest that enumerates all public npm packages in the monorepo with their directory paths and publishFromCi flags, acting as the authoritative registry for the release pipeline.

nodes.name: release-package-map.mjs
nodes.summary: ESM module that discovers all non-private packages in the monorepo and cross-validates them against the release manifest, providing utilities used by the release script to version-bump and order publish operations.

nodes.name: release-package-map.test.mjs
nodes.summary: Unit test file that verifies the release-package-map module correctly cross-validates discovered packages against the manifest, ensuring no packages are accidentally omitted from releases.

nodes.name: release.sh
nodes.summary: Top-level release orchestration script supporting canary and stable channels: rewrites package versions, builds artifacts, publishes all monorepo packages to npm, creates git tags, and restores the working tree on exit — sourcing release-lib.sh for shared helpers.

nodes.name: rollback-latest.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that repoints the npm dist-tag 'latest' for every public monorepo package back to a specified stable version, enabling emergency rollbacks without unpublishing.

nodes.name: run-typecheck-build-gaps.mjs
nodes.summary: ESM script that runs TypeScript type-checking across all monorepo packages and reports any packages that lack a build step, helping maintain consistent type-safety across the workspace.

nodes.name: run-vitest-stable.mjs
nodes.summary: Sophisticated test runner script that partitions vitest test files into serialized (route/authz) and general parallel batches and invokes vitest separately for each group, ensuring flaky integration tests do not block fast unit tests.

nodes.name: screenshot-pap2373.mjs
nodes.summary: One-off Playwright screenshot script created for issue PAP-2373, capturing a specific UI state for bug reproduction or visual regression documentation.

nodes.name: screenshot-recovery-card.cjs
nodes.summary: CommonJS Playwright script that screenshots the agent recovery card UI component, used to generate reference images for design review or documentation.

nodes.name: screenshot-subissues.mjs
nodes.summary: One-off Playwright screenshot script that captures the sub-issues panel UI for visual documentation or bug reporting.
